summary: Implemented atmosphere, fog, and lighting moods for US-013. Created `applyAtmosphere.ts` that mutates scene fog (near/far), background color, and light intensities in-place based on fog (0-1) and lightIntensity (0-1) scalars — no object recreation. Updated `createScene.ts` to initialize fog at construction. Updated `createLights.ts` defaults to match the clean end of the mood range. Split `sceneParamsChanged.ts` into full-change detection and geometry-only detection (`geometryParamsChanged`). Updated `initRenderer.ts` to apply atmosphere on every update independently of geometry rebuilds, satisfying the acceptance criterion that palette changes do not recreate the renderer. Fixed test mocks across 4 existing test files to include Fog and intensity properties required by the new atmosphere pipeline. All quality gates pass: lint, typecheck, 349 unit tests, 53 E2E tests.
